message:
feat(agents): load tribunal role prompts from spec with caching

Implement dynamic loading of agent role prompts from the
role_prompts_v0.1.md specification file, replacing hardcoded
placeholder prompts.

Implementation details:
- readRolePromptsSpecMarkdown(): Async loader with environment detection
  - Server: Reads from filesystem via fs.readFile
  - Client: Fetches from /_corpus/specs/role_prompts_v0.1.md

- extractBetweenMarkers(): Parses markdown to extract prompt blocks
  using BRENNER_ROLE_PROMPT_START/END comment markers

- rolePromptsSpecCache: Module-level cache to avoid repeated I/O
  - Caches the entire spec file on first load
  - Invalidated only on module reload

- Fallback behavior: Returns "[Prompt at: {path}]" placeholder when:
  - Spec file not found
  - Role markers not present in spec
  - Fetch/read errors occur

Test coverage:
- New test: "loads prompt content from the role prompts spec when available"
- Mocks fetch to return spec content with markers
- Verifies extracted prompt matches expected content
- Verifies correct fetch URL for client environment

This enables the Agent Mail tribunal system to use the versioned
prompts from specs/role_prompts_v0.1.md rather than inline strings,
supporting prompt iteration without code changes.
